sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Castle Biosciences (NASDAQ: CSTL) CEO sells 4,172 shares via trusts
feed.summary: Castle Biosciences CEO Derek Maetzold sold a total of 4,172 shares of common stock at a weighted-average price of $25.098 per share on April 21, 2026, as part of a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Concurrently, Maetzold exercised stock options to acquire 550 shares at $2.39 per share, selling a matching number of shares. After these transactions, Maetzold directly holds 21,479 shares, with additional indirect holdings through various family trusts.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Upgrades Harmony Gold (HMY) to Overweight
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has upgraded Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited (NYSE:HMY) to Overweight from Equal Weight, raising its price target due to a higher gold price forecast and the company's relative underperformance providing a valuation buffer. Harmony Gold reported a 20% year-over-year revenue increase and revised its dividend policy to return up to 50% of net free cash to investors. The company is involved in mineral exploration and processing across several regions.

feed.title: Fund Update: 1,398,774 HUMANA (HUM) shares added to PZENA INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT LLC portfolio
feed.summary: PZENA INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT LLC has increased its holdings in Humana (HUM) by 1,398,774 shares, as per a recent SEC 13F filing for the Q1 2026 report period. The article details other significant institutional investor activities, insider trading, congressional trading, and recent analyst ratings and price targets for Humana stock.

feed.title: BlackRock holds 29.3M Kimberly-Clark shares (NYSE: KMB) as of 03/31/2026
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A, reporting beneficial ownership of 29,295,775 shares of Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NYSE: KMB) common stock as of March 31, 2026. This stake represents 8.8% of Kimberly-Clark's class of securities. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 27,170,900 shares and sole dispositive power over all 29,295,775 shares.

feed.title: HCI Group sets June 18 payout for 40-cent quarterly dividend
feed.summary: HCI Group (NYSE: HCI) has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per common share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. HCI Group is a diversified holding company primarily engaged in insurance, reinsurance, real estate, claims services, and insurance technology.

feed.title: BlackRock (NASDAQ: HFWA) holds 5.46M shares, 13.3% stake
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment on Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 5,464,986 shares of Heritage Financial Corp (HFWA) common stock, which represents a 13.3% stake. The filing indicates BlackRock holds significant sole voting power over 5,408,228 shares and sole dispositive power over all 5,464,986 shares. The report also notes that iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF has an interest exceeding 5% in HFWA.

feed.title: Citizens Financial (NYSE: CFG) director receives 2,608 RSUs grant
feed.summary: Tracy A. Atkinson, a director at Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG), was granted 2,608 restricted stock units (RSUs) as compensation, as reported in a recent Form 4 filing. This award, granted under the company's 2014 Non-Employee Directors Compensation Plan, increased her direct holdings to 12,543.719 shares. The grant was an equity award for a non-employee director and not an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Citizens Financial (NYSE: CFG) grants director 2,608 RSUs
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group director Michele N. Siekerka was granted 2,608 shares as a restricted stock unit award under the company's 2014 Non-Employee Directors Compensation Plan. Following this award, her direct holdings increased to 66,159.978 shares of common stock, with additional indirect holdings through family members and an IRA. The transaction is compensation-related rather than a market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Citizens Financial (NYSE: CFG) director receives 2,608-share stock unit grant
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group director Christine M. Cumming was granted 2,608 shares of Common Stock as restricted stock units under the Amended & Restated Citizens Financial Group, Inc. 2014 Non-Employee Directors Compensation Plan. This transaction, which reflects a grant/award acquisition with no cash payment, increases her direct holdings to 52,341.017 shares of CFG common stock. The grant was reported on April 23, 2026, via an SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines SVP granted 740 restricted shares | DAL Insider Trading
feed.summary: Julia Ann McConnell, Senior Vice President, Controller, and Chief Accounting Officer at Delta Air Lines (DAL), was granted 740 restricted shares as part of the company's 2026 long-term incentive program. These shares, valued at $0.00 per share, were approved by the Personnel & Compensation Committee and will vest according to an award agreement. Following this grant, McConnell directly holds 18,728 shares of Delta common stock.

feed.title: Stifel Lowers General Mills (GIS) Target, Sees Slower Sales Growth Ahead
feed.summary: Stifel lowered its price target for General Mills (GIS) to $40 from $44 but reiterated a Buy rating, citing pressure on food group earnings due to weak volume growth, compressing margins from reinvestment needs, and potentially slower sales growth. BTIG also initiated coverage with a Neutral rating, expressing concerns about growth fundamentals, the "Remarkability playbook," a levered balance sheet, and valuation relative to peers. General Mills is a global manufacturer of branded consumer foods.

feed.title: Is Republic Services, Inc. (RSG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article examines Republic Services, Inc. (RSG) as a potential investment, summarizing a bullish thesis from Investomine's Substack. It highlights RSG's strong FY2025 performance, characterized by revenue growth, margin expansion, and robust free cash flow generation, driven by pricing power and disciplined cost control. Despite these positives, the article concludes by noting that RSG is not among the 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds and suggests that certain AI stocks might offer greater return potential.

feed.title: Michael Richards Sells 3,000 Shares of State Street (NYSE:STT) Stock
feed.summary: Michael Richards, EVP of State Street Corporation, sold 3,000 shares of company stock on April 22nd, 2026, for a total of $461,670, reducing his stake by 6.45%. This transaction comes as State Street exceeded quarterly earnings expectations with an EPS of $2.84 and a 15.6% year-over-year revenue increase. The company also pays a quarterly dividend of $0.84 per share, translating to a 2.2% yield.

feed.title: Autodesk nominates Pearson CEO Omar Abbosh to board By Investing.com
feed.summary: Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK) has announced the nomination of Omar Abbosh, current CEO of Pearson, to its Board of Directors as an independent director. Abbosh's experience in technology, strategy, and business transformation, particularly with AI in SaaS, is expected to be highly valuable. Stephen Milligan, who served on the audit committee, will not stand for re-election, maintaining the board at 11 directors with 10 independents.

feed.title: iHuman posts 2025 Form 20-F, offers free audited hard copies
feed.summary: iHuman Inc. (NYSE: IH) announced it filed its 2025 annual report on Form 20-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on April 24, 2026, for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The report, including audited financial statements, is available on the company's investor relations website. Shareholders and American Depositary Share (ADS) holders can also request a free hard copy by contacting iHuman's Beijing office.

feed.title: Thad Trent sells shares under 10b5-1 (ON)
feed.summary: Thad Trent, an insider at ON Semiconductor Corp (ON), reported multiple Rule 144 sales of common stock under pre-arranged 10b5-1 plans. The sales, totaling 120,000 shares for over $9 million, occurred on various dates in February and April 2026, with securities originating from RSUs and PSUs granted in 2022. These sales are considered neutral in impact and sentiment according to the filing analysis.

feed.title: Liberty Broadband Stock Plunges 26% as Charter Earnings Jolt Merger Bet
feed.summary: Liberty Broadband's shares dropped approximately 26% after Charter Communications reported higher-than-expected internet subscriber losses in its first quarter, directly impacting Liberty due to a pending all-stock merger. Liberty holders are set to receive Charter shares, meaning Liberty's value is closely tied to Charter's stock performance. The decline highlights market concerns over Charter's broadband subscriber retention and the implications for the merger's ultimate value to Liberty shareholders.

feed.title: Nessel calls DTE rate pause proposal a ‘ransom note’
feed.summary: Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel has labeled DTE Energy's proposal for a two-year rate increase pause as a "ransom note," expressing skepticism about the utility's conditions. DTE stated it would refrain from filing new rate requests until at least 2028, provided its controversial Saline Township data center project moves forward. Nessel argues that the benefits of such projects for consumers have not been proven and that the utility's offer is contingent on multiple approvals, not a firm commitment.

feed.title: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) affiliate files Form 144 to sell 37,791 shares
feed.summary: An Equifax Inc. affiliate has filed a Form 144 notice to sell 37,791 shares of common stock on April 24, 2026. The shares are related to an option granted on May 4, 2018, and the transaction is described as a cash sale on the NYSE. Form 144 is a notice of intent to sell and does not confirm the execution of the sale, which would be verified by subsequent filings.

feed.title: AES (AES) grants 44,483 RSUs to EVP and General Counsel Freedman
feed.summary: Paul L. Freedman, EVP and General Counsel of AES CORP, received an equity award of 44,483 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) under the company's 2025 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan. These RSUs will vest in three annual installments starting April 23, 2027, provided he remains employed. Following this award, Freedman directly holds 223,154 AES Common Stock shares and 3,130 indirectly through a 401(k) plan.

feed.title: [Form 4] AES CORP Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: AES Corp's EVP and CFO, Stephen Coughlin, was granted 50,345 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) under the company's 2025 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan. These RSUs will vest in three annual installments starting April 23, 2027, and will convert into common stock upon vesting. This transaction, a grant rather than a purchase, increases his direct holdings to 265,494 shares.

feed.title: S&P Global shareholders will vote online May 20 at 8:30 a.m. EDT
feed.summary: S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) announced that its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders will be held virtually on May 20, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. EDT. Shareholders can vote and submit questions online using a unique control number, and a webcast replay will be available for one year. The meeting will be presided over by Lord Ian Livingston and feature remarks and a Q&A session with President and CEO Martina Cheung.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Southern (SO) Could Change Following Its 25th Straight Dividend Hike - Learn Why
feed.summary: Southern Company (SO) recently announced its 25th consecutive annual dividend increase to US$0.76 per share quarterly, raising its annualized payout to US$3.04. This demonstrates the company's commitment to consistent cash returns for investors. However, the article highlights that Southern's investment narrative continues to depend on regulatory approvals for new power generation and the management of rising capital costs and potential equity issuance.

feed.title: Boston Scientific Corp Stock (BSX) Closed Down by 5.56% on Apr 24: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Boston Scientific Corp (BSX) stock closed down 5.56% on April 24th due to a lowered full-year 2026 guidance, despite beating Q1 2026 estimates. The guidance reduction was attributed to unforeseen hurdles in key segments like WATCHMAN, U.S. Electrophysiology, and Urology, as well as macro uncertainty and tariffs. Furthermore, a class-action lawsuit alleging misleading statements regarding the U.S. EP segment's growth rate added to negative market sentiment.

feed.title: Intuit Inc Stock (INTU) Closed Up by 3.30% on Apr 24: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Intuit Inc. (INTU) shares rose 3.30% on April 24, driven by strong fiscal Q2 2026 results exceeding expectations, confident full-year guidance, and strategic advancements in AI integration across its product portfolio. Additional factors include a legal victory against the FTC and FedNow Service certification for instant payment capabilities, enhancing its market position and investor confidence despite broader market anxieties about AI disruption. Analyst sentiment remains largely positive, reinforcing the stock's potential for future growth.

feed.title: Does Humana’s (HUM) New Fulfillment Index Reframe Its Senior-Care Edge Beyond Traditional Clinical Metrics?
feed.summary: Humana Inc. (HUM) recently held its annual shareholder meeting, announcing a US$2.14 billion ESOP-related shelf registration, an affirmed quarterly dividend, and the election of Robert S. Field to its board. Concurrently, its CenterWell subsidiary launched a 72-indicator Fulfillment Index aimed at comprehensively measuring senior well-being beyond standard clinical metrics. These developments suggest a dual focus for Humana on robust governance and workforce incentives, alongside a broader, more holistic approach to senior health.

feed.title: Edison International shareholders approve board nominees and key proposals By Investing.com
feed.summary: Edison International shareholders have approved all eleven director nominees and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent accounting firm. They also approved executive compensation, though a shareholder proposal regarding equity retention did not pass. The utility company maintains a 4.99% dividend yield and is preparing for upcoming earnings results.

feed.title: Coterra (CTRA) supplement updates Goldman Sachs valuation ranges ahead of May 4 vote
feed.summary: Coterra Energy has supplemented its joint proxy statement with updated valuation ranges from Goldman Sachs for its proposed merger with Devon Energy. The supplement provides detailed discounted cash flow (DCF) and implied per-share ranges for Coterra and the pro-forma combined company, alongside key financial inputs and transaction premia statistics. The company emphasizes that these disclosures are voluntary and do not alter the May 4, 2026 shareholder vote schedule.

feed.title: Huntington taps Bank of America vet in Pittsburgh as regional banking market director
feed.summary: Huntington National Bank has hired Keith Alves, a banking executive with three decades of commercial banking experience, as its new regional banking market director in Pittsburgh. Alves previously spent over six years at Bank of America. This move strengthens Huntington's presence in the western Pennsylvania and Ohio Valley regions.

feed.title: Harmonic Inc. (NASDAQ: HLIT) seeks 7M-share boost to 2025 equity plan in 2026 proxy
feed.summary: Harmonic Inc. (NASDAQ: HLIT) has called its 2026 annual stockholder meeting for June 4, 2026, as a virtual-only event. Key agenda items include the election of seven directors, advisory votes on executive compensation frequency, and a proposal to increase the share reserve for the 2025 Equity Incentive Plan by 7,000,000 shares to support attraction and retention of talent. The Board emphasizes its independent composition, separation of CEO and Chair roles, and commitment to corporate governance and social responsibility.

feed.title: Hang Muk Shin converts debt to GITS (GITS) shares and warrants in Form 4
feed.summary: Global Interactive Technologies, Inc. insider Hang Muk Shin converted approximately $105,444 of outstanding indebtedness into equity, receiving 90,123 shares of common stock and 81,739 warrants. This transaction adjusted his direct holdings to 285,000 shares and indirect holdings to 151,915 shares, with all figures reflecting a 1-for-20 reverse stock split effective January 27, 2025. The warrants are immediately exercisable at $1.29 per share and expire on May 7, 2030.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: HOG) holds 9.4% of Harley-Davidson, 10.55M shares
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing beneficial ownership of 10,554,876 shares of Harley-Davidson (NYSE: HOG) common stock, which represents 9.4% of the outstanding shares. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 10,218,083 shares and sole dispositive power over all 10,554,876 shares as of March 31, 2026. This significant, though passive, stake was finalized with a signature on April 24, 2026.

feed.title: BlackRock holds 22.6M TE Connectivity (NYSE: TEL) shares — 7.7% stake
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has reported a beneficial ownership of 22,601,797 shares of TE Connectivity PLC common stock, which represents a 7.7% stake in the company as of March 31, 2026. This information was disclosed in an Amendment No. 3 to a Schedule 13G/A filing, indicating that BlackRock holds sole voting power for 20,907,569 shares and sole dispositive power for all 22,601,797 shares. The filing specifies that various business units within BlackRock hold these shares, and while some other persons may have rights to dividends or sale proceeds, no single outside person holds more than 5% of the common stock.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: ROK) reports 9.1% stake — 10.22M shares disclosed
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a 9.1% beneficial ownership stake in Rockwell Automation (NYSE: ROK), totaling 10,222,503 shares as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 9,494,309 shares and sole dispositive power over all 10,222,503 shares. This passive ownership disclosure, signed on April 24, 2026, aggregates holdings across BlackRock's Reporting Business Units and does not signal activist intent.

feed.title: BlackRock increases reported position in NVR (NYSE:NVR) to 8.9% ownership
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 247,270 shares of NVR Inc. common stock, which represents 8.9% of the class as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 232,846 shares and sole dispositive power over all 247,270 shares. This amendment was signed on April 24, 2026.

feed.title: BlackRock reports 8.7% stake in Alexandria REIT (ARE) via Schedule 13G/A
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an Amendment No. 18 to a Schedule 13G/A, disclosing an 8.7% stake in Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc. (ARE). As of March 31, 2026, BlackRock beneficially owns 15,113,497 shares, with sole voting power over 14,393,960 shares and sole dispositive power over all 15,113,497 shares. This filing indicates a passive investment held across multiple BlackRock business units, not an intent to control the company.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: PFG) holds 19.56M shares, a 9.0% stake in PFG
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing beneficial ownership of 19,558,812 shares, representing a 9.0% stake in Principal Financial Group Inc (PFG) as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates BlackRock's sole voting power over 17,946,520 shares and sole dispositive power over all 19,558,812 shares. This updated disclosure reflects holdings by specific Reporting Business Units within BlackRock.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: APA) holds 8.3% of APA Corp, 29.4M shares (13G/A)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an Amendment No. 4 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting a beneficial ownership of 29,420,437 shares of APA Corp common stock, which represents an 8.3% stake in the company. This filing indicates that BlackRock has sole voting power over 28,812,346 shares and sole dispositive power over all 29,420,437 shares. The disclosure is a routine update for a passive institutional investor and was signed on April 24, 2026.

feed.title: BlackRock (NXPI) reports 20.7M shares, 8.2% stake in NXP Semiconductors (Amend. No.4)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has amended its Schedule 13G filing, reporting a beneficial ownership of 20,698,308 shares of NXP Semiconductors N.V. common stock, which constitutes an 8.2% stake in the company. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 19,442,064 shares and sole dispositive power over all 20,698,308 shares, signed by Spencer Fleming on April 24, 2026. This amendment is categorized as a passive investment, not signaling activist intent.

feed.title: BlackRock (COHR) holds 12.98M shares, 6.6% stake in Coherent Corp
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an Amendment No. 6 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting a beneficial ownership of 12,978,940 shares of Coherent Corp (COHR) common stock, which represents a 6.6% stake. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 12,190,574 shares and sole dispositive power over all 12,978,940 shares. As a passive reporting investor, this disclosure reflects BlackRock's position without an stated intent to change governance.

feed.title: BlackRock (IIIN) discloses 2.79M shares, 14.4% stake in INSTEEL Industries
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, revealing a beneficial ownership of 2,787,132 shares, representing a 14.4% stake in INSTEEL Industries Inc. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 2,756,005 shares and sole dispositive power over all 2,787,132 shares. Additionally, the iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF, an affiliated fund, holds more than 5% of INSTEEL Industries' common stock.

feed.title: BlackRock reports 35.2M LKQ shares, 13.8% stake (NYSE: LKQ)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting beneficial ownership of 35,232,320 shares of LKQ Corporation common stock, which represents a 13.8% stake in the company. The filing indicates BlackRock holds sole voting power over 34,497,752 shares and sole dispositive power over all 35,232,320 shares. This disclosure, identifying iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF as holding over 5% of the shares, reflects BlackRock's passive investment intentions in LKQ.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Cuts Hershey (HSY) PT amid Higher Oil and Commodity Pressures
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for The Hershey Company (HSY) to $227 from $247, while reiterating an Overweight rating, due to a more challenging forward commodity outlook exacerbated by rising oil prices. Similarly, Barclays also reduced its price objective for HSY to $225 from $240, citing "growing caution" in the consumer staples group and concerns about dividend sustainability for some companies due to higher input costs. The Hershey Company, known for its confectionery and salty snacks, is facing pressures from increased commodity costs.

feed.title: BlackRock Holds 8.1% of Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) in Filed 13G/A
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an Amendment No. 11 to its Schedule 13G/A, reporting a beneficial ownership of 164,371,297 shares of Huntington Bancshares Inc (HBAN) common stock, which represents 8.1% of the class. The filing specifies that BlackRock holds sole voting power over 152,135,621 shares and sole dispositive power over all 164,371,297 shares, with the reporting date as March 31, 2026, and the document signed on April 24, 2026. This indicates BlackRock's significant passive investment in Huntington Bancshares.

feed.title: BlackRock (NASDAQ: FITB) reports 72.6M Fifth Third shares held
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A, reporting beneficial ownership of 72,600,402 shares of Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ: FITB) common stock. This represents an 8.0% stake in the company, with 67,072,084 shares having sole voting power. The filing clarifies that these holdings are attributable to specific "Reporting Business Units" of BlackRock and not BlackRock as an aggregate entity.

feed.title: BlackRock (ENPH) holds 21.3M shares of Enphase, filing shows (16.3%)
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting beneficial ownership of 21,315,667 shares of Enphase Energy (ENPH) common stock, which constitutes 16.3% of the class. The filing specifies 20,994,869 shares with sole voting power and 21,315,667 shares with sole dispositive power. Additionally, the filing notes that iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF holds more than 5% of Enphase common stock.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: WAT) holds 7.64M shares of Waters, a 7.8% stake
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has filed an Amendment No. 18 to a Schedule 13G/A, disclosing beneficial ownership of 7,637,586 shares of Waters Corporation (WAT) common stock, which represents a 7.8% stake in the company as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure indicates a passive investment, with BlackRock holding both sole voting and dispositive power over the majority of these shares, aggregated across various reporting business units. The filing clarifies that this is not an active takeover bid but rather a routine update on its significant passive holding.

feed.title: Large insider and entity ownership reported at Global Interactive (GITS)
feed.summary: A Form 3 filing for Global Interactive Technologies, Inc. (GITS) reports significant existing insider and entity ownership, rather than new trades. The filing indicates that 3,038,309 shares of common stock are indirectly held and 3,897,555 shares are directly held. Footnotes clarify that some shares are owned by family members and by Sewang Co., Ltd., an entity controlled by Hang Muk Shin, who is a director and 10% owner.

feed.title: Fastenal (NASDAQ: FAST) investors approve equity plans, reject EEO-1 proposal
feed.summary: Fastenal Company shareholders re-elected all eleven director nominees, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor, and approved executive compensation and two equity plans (Employee Restricted Stock Unit Plan and Non-Employee Director Stock and Restricted Stock Unit Plan) at their annual meeting. However, a shareholder proposal seeking an EEO-1 report disclosure policy did not pass, receiving significantly more votes against than for. The meeting saw a strong turnout with over a billion shares represented.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson to launch on TrumpRx with 4 of its prescription drugs
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson will begin marketing four of its prescription medications on the Trump administration's TrumpRx website, a move stemming from a voluntary agreement made in January. This partnership allows J&J to lower costs for Americans through Medicaid access and market drugs on TrumpRx, in exchange for exemption from the president's tariff agenda. The drugs include metformin, Invokana, and Xarelto, doubling the number of medications available on the low-cost site; however, these prices are only accessible to uninsured patients or those whose insurance does not cover the prescriptions.
